projects.name: Product Designer Website
projects.summary: Portfolio and brand site for an independent product designer.
projects.description: Collaborative build from layout to launch: expressive visuals, clear case-study structure, and a deployable production site tuned for performance and easy updates.

projects.name: Pensjonistforbundet
projects.summary: Norway's largest membership organization advocating for pensioners and people with disabilities.
projects.description: Full-stack work on the public-facing site: member journeys, searchable content at scale, editorial workflows, and integrations that keep news, campaigns, and third-party tools in sync.

projects.name: Blomqvist
projects.summary: Historic Norwegian auction house with a digital catalog and live bidding.
projects.description: Engineering across the customer-facing stack: resilient checkout flows, account and payment edge cases, catalog performance under peak traffic, and hardening around time-sensitive transactional rules.

projects.name: Jotron
projects.summary: Global Norwegian manufacturer of safety and communication systems for maritime, aviation, and land industries.
projects.description: Full-stack ownership on the corporate web presence from early milestones: product storytelling, structured content, cross-team delivery with marketing, and iterative shipping as the site and requirements evolved.

projects.name: Helsedirektoratet
projects.summary: National health authority publishing guidelines, statistics, and services for citizens and professionals.
projects.description: Full-stack delivery on the public site: connecting editorial content to internal data and services, developing global microservices for asset delivery, shipping user-facing features end to end, and keeping releases aligned with strict accessibility and governance expectations.
